docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED STATES FIRE INSURANCE CO. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED STATES FIRE INSURANCE CO. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,225.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
